backend/main.mo: Motoko canister implementing message storage, user profiles, trusted contacts, and authorization checks with support for encrypted messages and relationship status queries.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs to involved frontend files, components, and test IDs with high-confidence associations.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of various frontend source files across hooks, components, pages, and crypto utilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base and theme variables defining OKLCH-driven light/dark color schemes and global styling tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML document mounting the React application and loading the main TypeScript entrypoint.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router routes, global theme provider, and wraps all pages in AuthGate and AppShell.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGate.ts: Authentication guard that enforces Internet Identity login and triggers profile setup for new users before rendering the app.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button integrating Internet Identity with loading states and automatic session clearing.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Transp: Displays transport key diagnostic states and allows copying a JSON snapshot of diagnostics.
Provides the main application layout with navigation, header, footer, and dynamic content area.
frontend/src/components/messages/Diagnos: Shows message‑sending eligibility diagnostics and copies detailed JSON diagnostics to the clipboard.
frontend/src/components/messages/Iso2002: Form-based ISO 20022 message editor with live raw-format preview generation.
frontend/src/components/messages/RawPrev: Renders raw message content with a copy-to-clipboard action.
frontend/src/components/messages/SwiftCo: Form-based SWIFT message editor that generates and previews raw SWIFT message output.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the user's identity, refreshing dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and provider managing Internet Identity login, stored identities, and AuthClient setup with status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useProfiles.ts: React Query hooks to fetch and update user profiles via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Hooks for fetching messages and sending new encrypted messages using the actor API.
frontend/src/hooks/useSyncStatus.ts: Hook to fetch sync/relationship status between the caller and another principal.
frontend/src/hooks/useTransportKey.ts: Manages generation, storage, restoration, and backend registration of per-user transport keypairs tied to vetKeys.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrustedContacts.ts: Hooks for querying, adding, removing, and checking trusted contacts through the actor API.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles with custom color variables and dark mode theme definitions.
frontend/src/lib/crypto/e2ee.ts: Implements hybrid RSA/AES encryption and decryption for message payloads.
frontend/src/lib/crypto/transportKeys.ts: Generates, exports, imports, and persists RSA-OAEP transport keypairs for local encryption use.
frontend/src/lib/messageFormats/iso20022: Defines an ISO 20022 message interface with helpers to create empty messages, generate XML, and parse raw XML back into structured data.
frontend/src/lib/messageFormats/swift.ts: Defines a SWIFT MT103 message interface with functions to create default messages, generate SWIFT raw format, and parse raw SWIFT text.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers before rendering the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ComposeMessagePage.ts: UI for composing ISO 20022 or SWIFT messages, selecting recipients, checking sync status, encrypting, and sending messages.
frontend/src/pages/ContactsPage.tsx: Displays trusted contacts with readiness status and allows adding, removing, and refreshing contact relationship info.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Shows user identity details, transport key status, and provides actions to generate keys and navigate to message composition.
frontend/src/pages/InboxPage.tsx: Lists sent and received messages with metadata and navigation to detailed message views.
frontend/src/pages/MessageDetailPage.tsx: Displays full message details, decrypts content with the user's transport key, and parses ISO20022 or SWIFT messages for viewing.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupModal.tsx: Modal for creating a user profile, allowing name entry and calling a saveProfile mutation.
frontend/src/utils/base64.ts: Provides base64 encode/decode helpers for Uint8Array and ArrayBuffer, used for persisting binary key data.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters and session-stored values, supporting hash-based routing.
frontend/src/utils/vetKey.ts: Implements session-scoped vetKey generation, validation, storage, and lookup for transport keypair persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration defining theme extensions, colors, animations, and plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata, features, and vetKey-related requirements for transport key context sharing.
